entities.name: RICE
entities.description: Staple food crop in India requiring significant water for production

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: Country where food security is a priority and rice is a staple crop

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food

entities.name: SYSTEM OF RICE INTENSIFICATION
entities.description: A method aimed at enhancing input use efficiency in rice cultivation

entities.name: INPUT USE EFFICIENCY
entities.description: The efficiency with which inputs like water and nutrients are used in crop production

entities.name: NATIONAL FOOD SECURITY MISSION
entities.description: A government initiative in India to increase rice production

entities.name: WATER SHORTAGES
entities.description: A lack of sufficient water resources affecting rice cultivation

entities.name: URBANIZATION
entities.description: The process of making an area more urban, contributing to the reduction of land available for rice

entities.name: WATER SAVING METHODS
entities.description: Techniques used to reduce the amount of water required for rice cultivation
